data.title: Deok-ho Lim spoke at Jiangsu Province Pet Economic Development Conference, highlighting AI content's role in animal medicine marketing.
data.description: In HUAian, China, the NEL Animal Cardiovascular Center unveiled a novel marketing strategy at the 2nd Jiangsu Province Pet Economic Development Conference. They highlighted the significance of AI content in promoting animal medicine.

data.title: 1Finity and Fujitsu announce opening of networking innovation center in Americas to advance digital infrastructure.
data.description: In Sunnyvale, California, a new open network testing center has been launched by 1Finity and Fujitsu, aiming to support network operators in enhancing reliable, sustainable, and multivendor digital infrastructure. This initiative seeks to facilitate the advancement of connectivity through collaborative efforts.

data.title: $25M pledged by NVIDIA to boost AI education in U.S. K-12 schools, collaborating with Study Fetch and CK-12.
data.description: NVIDIA has committed $25 million to improve AI education for K-12 students in the United States. The company is teaming up with Study Fetch and CK-12 to support AI education programs. This generous contribution will help advance AI education initiatives in the country.

data.title: DOJ & NEC plan to identify state laws affecting national economy.
data.description: On Friday, the Justice Department and National Economic Council revealed a strategy to pinpoint state statutes that harm the national economy or interstate economic activity. This initiative aims to scrutinize laws that impede economic growth and interstate trade. The plan seeks to address laws that hinder the national economy's progress or disrupt the flow of interstate commerce, ultimately focusing on increasing economic efficiency.

data.title: Ciena stock rises post Q3 earnings beat with revenue exceeding estimates, guidance above expectations.
data.description: Ciena shares surged following the release of its fiscal Q3 earnings report, which showed both revenue and earnings surpassing analysts' expectations. The company's guidance for future performance also exceeded predictions. The boost in stock price comes on the heels of a notable increase in orders from Meta Data Center, further highlighting Ciena's strong performance.

data.title: Stock market rallies before jobs report; Amazon, Netflix, Shopify show buy signals. Broadcom rises late.
data.description: As the market surged leading up to the release of the jobs report, key tech companies such as Amazon, Netflix, and Shopify showed indications to buy. Broadcom saw a late increase, contributing to the positive trend. Additionally, Dow Jones Futures experienced an uptick as Broadcom's stocks rose towards the end of the session. The anticipation of the jobs report had a notable impact on investor sentiment.

data.title: Offerpad will be participating in the Goldman Sachs Communacopia + Technology Conference in Tempe, Arizona.
data.description: In Tempe, Arizona, Offerpad has declared its involvement in the Goldman Sachs Communacopia + Technology Conference.

data.title: Utz Brands, Inc. (NYSE: UTZ) to pay $0.061 per share cash dividend on October 2, 2025 to stockholders of record by Sep 15, 2025.
data.description: In Hanover, Pennsylvania, Utz Brands, Inc. (NYSE: UTZ), a prominent U.S. producer of branded salty snacks and small-cap value Staples equity, revealed that the Board of Directors has approved a regular quarterly cash dividend of around $0.061 per share on the Company's Class A Common Stock. The payment is scheduled for October 2, 2025, to stockholders of record as of September 15, 2025.
